indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX matches_calendar_idx ON public.matches USING btree ("dateISO", "courtId", "time")
CREATE INDEX matches_created_at_idx ON public.matches USING btree (created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX matches_owner_id_idx ON public.matches USING btree (owner_id)
CREATE INDEX matches_participants_idx ON public.matches USING gin (participants)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX matches_pkey ON public.matches USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX matches_status_type_idx ON public.matches USING btree (status, type)
CREATE INDEX messages_match_timestamp_idx ON public.messages USING btree (match_id, "timestamp")
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX messages_pkey ON public.messages USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX profiles_first_name_trgm_idx ON public.profiles USING gin (lower(first_name) gin_trgm_ops)
CREATE INDEX profiles_last_name_trgm_idx ON public.profiles USING gin (lower(last_name) gin_trgm_ops)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX profiles_pkey ON public.profiles USING btree (id)

policies.with_check_expression: ((type = 'match'::text) AND (COALESCE("isPrivate", false) = false) AND (status = ANY (ARRAY['open'::text, 'upcoming'::text, 'searching'::text, 'confirmed'::text])) AND ((auth.uid())::text = ANY (participants)))

((sender_id = auth.uid()) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM matches m
  WHERE ((m.id = messages.match_id) AND ((m.owner_id = auth.uid()) OR ((auth.uid())::text = ANY (m.participants)) OR is_admin())))))

policies.using_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM matches m
  WHERE ((m.id = messages.match_id) AND ((m.owner_id = auth.uid()) OR ((auth.uid())::text = ANY (m.participants)) OR is_admin()))))

triggers.definition: CREATE TRIGGER set_matches_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON matches FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_updated_at()
CREATE TRIGGER set_profiles_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON profiles FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_updated_at()

p_match_id uuid, p_confirmed_by uuid, p_rating_changes jsonb

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_admin()
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  select exists (
    select 1
    from public.profiles p
    where p.id = auth.uid()
      and p.role = 'admin'
  );
$function$

constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (owner_id) REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (match_id) REFERENCES matches(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (sender_id) REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
